description: Runneth gets to know each person it works with — their goals, preferences, and working style — and adapts to them over time.

customize.description: Path to the blank template used when creating a new team member file.
Path to the one-pager template used when creating a new conversation file.

changelog.notes: Now requires add-permissions. Identity resolution delegates to permissions resolvers (slack-whoami.sh / motion-whoami.sh) instead of maintaining its own user-map. Team files now live inside each member's home base. Slack surface now supported. user-map.json removed.
Initial release. Email-based user identification, team file per person with template, conversation one-pager system.
